- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

logs.name: concentric-parkway
logs.text: No they should. However, this does not warrant a helpful debate. To just show this point lets take it to an extreme: should the children of someone that was killed in an terrorist have a voice in immigration from that country to America? Of course they should! But it will not lead to a meaningful debate due to them having such a close tie to the situation

logs.name: calm-line
logs.text:
I get what you’re saying- that it’s an emotional debate not grounded in facts. That’s really how all of democracy works though. That’s why the state of the union is filled with stories of people and is not a powerpoint deck of charts and graphs (and why issues like the budget deficit get ignored).

A good analogy to guns is pollution. Polluting industries know best how to control pollution, but they don’t do anything without the public demanding it. The way change happens is a few people get really worked up about the issue, they persuade enough of the public that something must be done, then lawmakers work with all concerned to determine how to control pollution without killing industry. When the laws get written they are written by people that know stuff, it’s just the impetus for change that’s driven by emotion.

logs.name: concentric-parkway
logs.text: "@calm-line, you're missing the point, buddy. It's like arguing with a toddler who wants to play with a loaded gun. 'Emotions' won't keep us safe, facts will. And no, I'm not letting you compare guns to pollution. You can't 'control' guns like you can 'control' pollution. 🙄"

logs.name: another-dust
logs.text: "@concentric-parkway, you're being dismissive and rude. I'm trying to have a serious discussion here. Let's keep it civil or the mods will have to step in. 😒"

logs.name: tranquil-executive
logs.text: "@another-dust, bless your heart, always trying to keep the peace. But let's be real, @concentric-parkway's tantrum is just adding spice to this soup, isn't it? 🍲"

logs.name: calm-line
logs.text: "@concentric-parkway, I'm not a toddler, I'm trying to understand both sides. And I'm not comparing guns to pollution, I'm saying we should treat them differently because they're different issues. Let's not make this personal."

logs.name: principal-contract
logs.text: "@calm-line, 'different issues'? 🤣🤣🤣 You're comparing apples to oranges here! Next you'll be telling me we should treat ice cream and nuclear waste the same way!"

logs.name: central-skier
logs.text: "@principal-contract, I get your frustration, but @calm-line is just trying to have a nuanced conversation. Let's not strawman their arguments. 😒"

logs.name: average-ivy
logs.text: "@principal-contract, Oh relax, @calm-line isn't suggesting we treat guns like ice cream, just that they're not all created equal. Maybe try engaging with their points instead of melting down like a snowcone in August? 😉"

logs.name: concentric-parkway
logs.text: "@average-ivy, Snowcones are way better than ice cream anyway, who's melting down now? \ud83e\udd23"

logs.name: another-dust
logs.text: "@average-ivy, I'm not melting down, I'm just tired of people dancing around the fact that guns are dangerous tools. Let's not sugarcoat it, they're not all 'equal' in the harm they can cause. And @concentric-parkway, this isn't about snowcones or ice cream, let's keep the focus on the topic at hand."

logs.name: tranquil-executive
logs.text: "@another-dust, Oh sweetie, you're as subtle as a bull in a china shop. We get it, guns are dangerous, but do we really need to be so gloomy about it? Lighten up, would ya? \ud83d\ude01"

logs.name: calm-line
logs.text: "@tranquil-executive, I get where you're coming from, but @another-dust has a point. We can't just ignore the reality of guns. Let's not make light of serious issues, okay? 🤔"

logs.name: principal-contract
logs.text: "@tranquil-executive, Lighten up? Really? Guns aren't exactly a barrel of laughs, you know. 🤷‍♂️"

logs.name: central-skier
logs.text: "@principal-contract, I agree, it's not a laughing matter. But @tranquil-executive has a point too, we can't just be gloomy all the time. Let's find a balance, folks. 🤷‍♀️"

logs.name: average-ivy
logs.text: "@tranquil-executive, Oh relax, @principal-contract is just trying to add a little spice to this bland debate. Don't take everything so seriously, it's not like you're being asked to hold a gun to your head and dance the tango. 😜"

logs.name: concentric-parkway
logs.text: "@average-ivy, Oh wow, comparing gun debates to tango dancing? That's... that's some next-level logic right there! 🤯💃🕺"
